title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
